instruction:
Evaluate the triple integral $\int \int \int f(x,y,z) \, dx \, dy \, dz$ over the solid $f(x,y,z) = e^{\sqrt{x^2+y^2}}$, $1 \le x^2+y^2 \le 4$, $y \le 0$, $x \le y \cdot \sqrt{3}$, $2 \le z \le 3$.

Options:
A. π * e^2 / 7
B. π * e^2 / 8
C. π * e^2 / 4
D. π * e^2 / 10
E. π * e^2 / 3
F. π * e^2 / 5
G. π * e^2 / 12
H. π * e^2 / 9
I. π * e^2 / 6
J. π * e^2 / 18
